ORDER GRANTING PLAINTIFF'SMOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES, SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS

DISCOVERY 610, PLAINTIFF PEDRO MENDOZA'S MOTION TO COMPEL DEFENDANTS PERLA ALIBAYAN TABAJONDA'S AND RODOLFO TABAJONDA'S FURTHER RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES, SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, AND REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION, SET ONE, IS GRANTED. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED AGAINST DEFENDANTS, JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY, IN THE AMOUNT OF $2,065, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT. NOT REPORTED

Mtn To Compel Deft'S Further Responses To Form Interoggs
Off Calendar Aug-19-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Kristen Ross, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: PEDRO MENDOZA
Victoria Townsend, Esq., for Defendant and opposing party: Perla A. Tabajond and Rodolfo Tabajonda

After hearing, tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF PEDRO MENDOZA's Motion To Compel Defendants Perla Alibayan Tabajonda's And Rodolfo Tabajonda's Further Responses To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, Request For Production Of Documents, And Requests For Admission, Set One, is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendants' failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendants are ordered to respond further within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded against Defendants, jointly and severally, in the amount of $2,065, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Order signed in open court. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-25-2010 Set For Trial On Feb-14-11 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Jan-31-11 At 02:30 P.M. In Dept 306
